Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a database

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to change a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is starting a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to start a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create database {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is creating database {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} started a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is stopping a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is deleting a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created database {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to stop a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} deleted a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} stopped a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete a database of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
